subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you — I'd be glad to set up a follow-up meeting to explore how we might work together.

Please send over a few time slots that work for you next week and I'll confirm what fits on our end.

As for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm not able to share those. Once we've had our initial conversation, I can help determine the right people to involve and facilitate introductions as needed.

Talk soon.

Best regards
